vocab.word: cost an arm and a leg
vocab.meaning: rất đắt đỏ, tốn kém cực kỳ
vocab.example: I’ve always admired high-end sports cars, even though maintaining one would probably cost an arm and a leg.

vocab.meaning: một chiếc xe cực kỳ tốn xăng
vocab.example: I'm not a fan of old, oversized SUVs because they are typically gas guzzlers and aren't eco-friendly at all.

vocab.meaning: các tính năng phụ trợ hào nhoáng, hiện đại (thường không quá thiết yếu)
vocab.example: I prefer modern electric cars because they come with all the latest bells and whistles, like self-parking and touch-screen dashboards.

vocab.meaning: phá cách, làm điều gì đó khác biệt hoàn toàn so với truyền thống
vocab.example: I like vehicles that break the mold in terms of design, such as the futuristic-looking Cybertruck.
I lean towards luxury sedans because the driving experience is as smooth as silk, even on uneven road surfaces.
